zh.Horsham, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可霍沙安
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix Carter於1565年出生在英國素可霍沙安時，她的父親Henry Carter25歲，母親Jone Pilcher22歲。她於1586年1月30日與Henry Quenell III在英國素可霍沙安結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1610年7月2日之前在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國素可霍沙安。

zh-hans.Horsham, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可霍沙安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix Carter于1565年出生在英国素可霍沙安时，她的父亲Henry Carter25岁，母亲Jone Pilcher22岁。她于1586年1月30日与Henry Quenell III在英国素可霍沙安结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1610年7月2日之前在她的家乡，埋葬在英国素可霍沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Carter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a transporter of goods, from Middle English carter(e) ‘carter’ (Anglo-Norman French car(e)tier, Old French charetier, medieval Latin carettarius, carettator). The Old French word coalesced with the earlier Middle English word cart(e) ‘cart’, which is from either Old Norse kartr or Old English cræt, both of which, like the Late Latin word, were probably derived from Celtic. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Charman
meanings: English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for a carter, carrier, or coachman, from Middle English (Old French) char, car ‘car, cart, carriage’ + Middle English man ‘man’. Compare Carter and Carman 2.

English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for someone who did odd jobs, from Middle English char(re), chere (Old English cier(r), cer(r), cear(r), cær(r)) ‘turn (of activity), small job, chore’ + man. Compare Carman 2.
In some cases probably also an Americanized form of Slovenian Čarman (see Carman 5).

variants.name: Chartier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Adelard, Alcide, Emile, Gilles, Raoul, Rosaire, Alphonse.
French: shortened form of charretier, an occupational name for a carter, from an agent derivative of Old French charette ‘cart’.
French Canadian: altered form of English   Carter  , a cognate of 1 above. Compare   Sharkey   and   Shorkey  .

variants.name: Karter
meanings: German: occupational name for a carder (someone who prepares wool for spinning), from Middle High German karter. Compare Carter .

variants.name: McCarter
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   McArthur  .

variants.name: Carrier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Lucien, Cecile, Alain, Gaetan, Gilles, Jacques, Laurent, Normand.

English and southern French: from Middle English, Old French car(r)ier (from Late Latin carrarius, a derivative of carrum ‘cart, wagon’, a word of Gaulish origin), an occupational name for a carter (see Carter ), in French also for a cartwright. Compare French Charrier .
French: occupational name for a stonemason or quarryman, carrier. Compare Coyer .

variants.name: Cartman
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): occupational name from Middle English cartman ‘man who operated a cart for the transport of goods’. Compare Carter .

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix Carter was born in 1565, in Horsham, Sussex, England, her father, Henry Carter, was 25 and her mother, Jone Pilcher, was 22. She married Henry Quenell III on 30 January 1586, in Horsham, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died before 2 July 1610, in her hometown, and was buried in Horsham, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix Carter est née en 1565, à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Henry Carter, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Jone Pilcher, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Quenell III le 30 janvier 1586, à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 2 juillet 1610, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix Carter 1565 in Horsham, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Carter 25 und ihre Mutter Jone Pilcher 22. Sie hat am 30. Januar 1586 in Horsham, Sussex, England Henry Quenell III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 2. Juli 1610 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Horsham, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix Carter è nata il nel 1565 nel Horsham, Sussex, England, sua padre, Henry Carter, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Jone Pilcher, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Henry Quenell III il 30 gennaio 1586, nel Horsham, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì prima del 2 luglio 1610, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Horsham, Sussex, England.

ja.Horsham, Sussex, England: イギリスイギリススセックスホールシャム
ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix Carterが1565年にイギリススセックスホールシャムで生まれた時，父Henry Carterは25歳，母Jone Pilcherは22歳であった。1586年1月30日にイギリススセックスホールシャムでHenry Quenell IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1610年7月2日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリススセックスホールシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix Carter(이)가 1565년 영국 수세스 호르샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Carter(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jone Pilcher(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1586년 1월 30일 영국 수세스 호르샤에서 Henry Quenell III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1610년 7월 2일 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 수세스 호르샤에 묻혔다.

mn.Horsham, Sussex, England: Horsham, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix Carter nasceu em 1565, em Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Carter, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Jone Pilcher, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Quenell III em 30 de janeiro de 1586, em Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 2 de julho de 1610, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix Carter родилась в 1565 г. в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Carter было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Jone Pilcher, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Quenell III 30 января 1586 г. в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 2 июля 1610 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix Carter nació en 1565, en Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Carter, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Jone Pilcher, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Henry Quenell III el 30 de enero de 1586, en Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió antes de 2 de julio de 1610, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra.
